areas.name: Roof
observations: Membrane roof showing significant age
Multiple patches visible
Gutters clogged with debris
Estimated roof age: 18 years
issues: Clogged gutters increase water intrusion risk

areas.name: Walls and Exterior
observations: Metal panels show rust and corrosion
Brick mortar deteriorating in several areas
Weatherproofing caulk cracked and failing
Parking lot has significant cracks and settling

areas.name: HVAC System
observations: Multiple rooftop units - mixed ages
Some units showing rust and corrosion
Ductwork visible and appears to have gaps
No recent maintenance records provided

areas.name: Plumbing
observations: Multiple water heaters for different zones
Pipes show signs of age and corrosion
Drain systems adequate but aging
No emergency shut-off locations clearly marked
issues: Maintenance access needed for emergency shutoffs

areas.name: Electrical System
observations: Main service: 400-amp three-phase
Panel room organization poor
Some older branch circuits present
Emergency generators present but not recently tested
issues: Older circuits may not meet current codes

areas.name: Common Areas
observations: Carpeting worn and stained
Lighting fixtures aging and some non-functional
Drop ceiling tiles stained and sagging
Restrooms showing signs of water damage

findings.analysis: Significant thermal variations across roof. Hot spots at HVAC units and cold spots indicating poor insulation. Roof membrane showing age-related thermal degradation.
anomalies: Hot spots (45°C) at HVAC unit bases
Cold zones (28°C) indicating thin membrane insulation
Temperature differential of 17°C suggests energy losses
findings.severity: HIGH - Significant thermal bridging and insulation failure

findings.analysis: Metal panels show significant temperature variations consistent with corrosion and gaps. Poor thermal envelope control.
anomalies: Cold streaks (16°C) at panel joints indicating air leakage
Hot spots (32°C) at rust areas due to conductivity changes
Large temperature variations indicate air infiltration
findings.severity: HIGH - Air infiltration and thermal bridging

findings.analysis: Multiple distinct temperature zones visible. Evidence of zoned HVAC systems not communicating properly. Some areas showing cold spots indicating air leaks.
anomalies: Cold spots in corners suggesting air infiltration
findings.severity: MEDIUM - Zone control and air infiltration issues

findings.analysis: Water heater showing elevated surface temperatures (55°C). Surrounding pipes show thermal losses indicating poor insulation.
anomalies: Water heater surface exceeds optimal operating temperature
Significant heat loss in distribution lines
findings.severity: MEDIUM - Efficiency losses in hot water systems

findings.analysis: Panel room temperature elevated (28°C) suggesting poor ventilation. Some circuit breakers showing minor heat signatures.
anomalies: Minor hot spots on high-load circuits

findings.analysis: Asphalt showing uneven thermal patterns. Cracks and settling visible as temperature discontinuities.

thermal_report.overall_analysis: Thermal imaging reveals multiple areas of concern. Primary issues: (1) Roof and HVAC system efficiency, (2) Metal facade air infiltration, (3) Water heater and distribution losses, (4) Parking lot structural issues. Building envelope integrity compromised.
thermal_report.energy_loss_estimate: Estimated annual energy cost increase of 20-25% due to identified thermal deficiencies
thermal_report.moisture_risk_assessment: MEDIUM - Air infiltration pathways identified at facade joints and roof
recommended_thermal_improvements: Replace roof membrane and improve insulation
Seal metal panel joints and add thermal breaks
Insulate hot water lines and optimize heater
Repair asphalt parking lot and address settling

images.description: Thermal image showing HVAC units and roof membrane temperature variations
Metal panel facade showing air infiltration patterns
